object_attributes.title: Bug: Webhook endpoint fails on push events
object_attributes.description: The `/api/v1/webhook` endpoint returns a 500 internal server error when it receives a `push` event from GitLab. It works fine for issues and merge requests. Expected behavior: gracefully ignore push events if they are not supported.

object_attributes.title: Feature: Add WebSocket support for Activity Feed
object_attributes.description: Currently the dashboard uses polling every 1 second to fetch the ECS state. We should migrate this to Server-Sent Events (SSE) or WebSockets to reduce load and make the UI truly real-time.

object_attributes.title: Security: Hardcoded API token in test files
object_attributes.description: Found a hardcoded `GL_PAT` token in `tests/conftest.py`. This is a severe security risk if the repository becomes public. We need to rotate the token and use environment variables.

object_attributes.title: Fix: Handle unsupported webhook event types gracefully
object_attributes.description: Resolves #501. Added event type validation in `webhook.py` to return a 200 OK early for `push` events, avoiding the KeyError in the translation system.

object_attributes.title: Chore: Update httpx from 0.24.1 to 0.27.0
object_attributes.description: Dependabot PR to update python package httpx to the latest version. All tests pass locally.

merge_request.title: Fix: Handle unsupported webhook event types gracefully
